articles.title: Shaw hat-trick helps Man City to convincing win against Spurs
articles.description: Bunny Shaw scores a record-breaking hat-trick inside 21 minutes as Manchester City beat Tottenham Hotspur 5-2.

articles.title: Late London City equaliser ends Chelsea's winning run
articles.description: Isobel Goodwin scores a late equaliser for London City Lionesses and ends Chelsea's five-game winning run.

articles.description: Arne Slot needs answers quickly or Liverpool's unwanted records may no longer be his only worry.

articles.title: Negative West Texas Gas Prices Reveal Mismatch in Global Energy
articles.description: A dislocation in global energy supplies means that even as buyers in some parts of the world are desperate to secure gas, there’s so much extra production in Texas that producers are burning it off as quickly as they’re allowed.

articles.title: Why drawing eyes on food packaging could stop seagulls stealing your chips

articles.title: Dishwashing with side effects: Kitchen sponges release microplastics

articles.title: States need data tools and incentives to stop improper federal payments
articles.description: Congress and the administration must prioritize rooting out federal waste by leveraging federal data to prevent benefit fraud and mandating the use of three key databases to ensure that only eligible individuals receive benefits.

articles.title: Tanginoa scores four as Wire hammer sorry Castleford
articles.description: Kelepi Tanginoa scores four tries as Warrington Wolves move second in Super League with a big win over Castleford Tigers.

articles.title: Exeter beat Sale to move into Prem play-off places
articles.description: Exeter move into the Prem play-off places after a 26-14 win over Sale at Sandy Park.

articles.title: 'Not just goals, he's a great connecter' - should Welbeck be in England squad?
articles.description: Danny Welbeck scores two goals against Liverpool on Saturday to take his tally for the season to 12 - one day after he was left out of Thomas Tuchel's England squad.

articles.title: Fed’s Powell Lauds Volcker Record in Face of Political Pressure
articles.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Saturday lauded the policy record of the late Fed Chair Paul Volcker, who raised interest rates and sparked a recession to tame the high inflation that took off during the 1970s.

articles.title: Northampton return to top with narrow win over bottom side Newcastle
articles.description: Northampton Saints go top of the Prem table with a hard fought and often unconvincing 28-27 victory over bottom club Newcastle Red Bulls.

articles.title: Glens close gap at top as Crues move off bottom spot
articles.description: Glentoran can only close the gap to league leaders Larne by a point in their final pre-split fixture after they draw 1-1 with 10-man Coleraine at the Oval.

articles.title: Before looters move in, strengthen Iran sanctions on antiquities trafficking
